name: Order Samurai Promotion Policy
goal: Prevent exploratory code, undocumented utilities, or unowned assets from entering the live runtime plane.

promotionChecklist.statement: The asset has one clear purpose and a named owner.
All repo-local paths resolve through the canonical path authority.
Inputs, outputs, side effects, and failure modes are documented.
The asset has targeted tests or a deterministic smoke check.
The asset is visible to the appropriate verifier and doctor flow.
Human-readable architecture docs are updated with the runtime change.
The asset does not depend on archive, scratch, or exploratory surfaces.

blockers: hidden dependency on scratch or archive surfaces

requirements: remove live references before archival move
retain historical material only behind archive boundaries
